checks={
'180958 Super Bowl': lambda t: ('super bowl' in t and ('seahawks' in t or 'patriots' in t or 'seattle' in t or 'new england' in t)),

'652747 Navalny toxin': lambda t: ('navalny' in t and ('toxin' in t or 'novichok' in t or 'body' in t or 'tissue' in t)),
'304287 Bangladesh opposition': lambda t: ('bangladesh' in t and ('opposition' in t or 'election' in t or 'parliament' in t)) or 'jamaat-e-islami' in t,
'901381 rail cables': lambda t: ('burned cables' in t or ('high-speed rail' in t and ('olympics' in t or 'winter olympics' in t or 'cables' in t)))
}
arts=[]
for line in open(path):
    a=json.loads(line)
    if (a.get('date_publish') or '')>'2026-02-06': continue
    title=a.get('title') or ''; c=a.get('content') or ''
    t=(title+'\\n'+c).lower()
    arts.append((a,title,c,t))
